---
title: "HF_distributions"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("scripts", "load_functions.R"))
triggerR <- load_trigger_functions()
```

```{r}
accounts <- if (!exists("accounts")) {
  triggerR$active_accounts()
} else accounts

trigger_daily <- if (!exists("trigger_daily")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "daily", cores = 5)
} else trigger_daily

trigger_hourly <- if (!exists("trigger_hourly")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "hourly", cores = 5)
} else trigger_hourly
```

```{r}
hf_daily <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date())
```

## Distribution of records per user

```{r}
p_user_dist <- hf_daily %>%
  group_by(userId) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(n)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "lightblue", color = "darkblue") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = "Total records per user (log10)", y = "Number of users", title = "Distribution of records per user")

p_user_dist
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_distribution_records_per_user.png"), 
       plot = p_user_dist, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Distribution of daily records

```{r}
p_day_dist <- hf_daily %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(n)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "lightblue", color = "darkblue") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = "Records per day (log10)", y = "Frequency", title = "Distribution of daily records")

p_day_dist
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_distribution_records_per_day.png"),
       plot = p_day_dist, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Distribution of daily records by source

```{r}
p_source_box <- hf_daily %>%
  group_by(source, date) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = source, y = n,, fill = source)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Records per day (log10)", title = "Distribution of daily records by source") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_source_box
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_distribution_records_by_source_boxplot.png"), 
       plot = p_source_box, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## Distribution of user-day records

```{r}
p_userday_dist <- hf_daily %>%
  ggplot(aes(n_records_total)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "lightblue", color = "darkblue") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = "Records per user-day (log10)", y = "Frequency", title = "Distribution of records per user-day")

p_userday_dist
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_distribution_records_per_user_day.png"), 
       plot = p_userday_dist, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^p_"))
rm(hf_daily)
```

## Measurments Histograms

```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=12}
p_dens_HF <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep", type == "mean", !is.na(value)) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  select(source, userId, date, hour, n_obs_valid, measurement, value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = source)) + 
  geom_density() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~measurement, scales = "free", ncol = 5)

p_dens_HF
```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
p_dens_HF_pm_pc <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep", type == "mean", !is.na(value)) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date(), str_detect(measurement, "^(pm|pc)")) %>%
  mutate(value_log1p = log10(value + 1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value_log1p)) +
  geom_density(fill = "lightblue") +
  facet_wrap(~measurement, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(x = "log10(value + 1)", y = "Density")

p_dens_HF_pm_pc
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_measurement_density_all.png"),
       plot = p_dens_HF, width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_measurement_density_pm_pc_log.png"),
       plot = p_dens_HF_pm_pc, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=12}
 p_dens_valid_HF <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep", type == "mean", !is.na(value)) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  select(source, userId, date, hour, n_obs_valid, measurement, value) %>%
  mutate(n_obs_valid = as.integer(n_obs_valid)) %>%
  filter(n_obs_valid <= 60) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_obs_valid, fill = source)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~measurement, scales = "free", ncol = 5)

p_dens_valid_HF
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_n_obs_valid_distribution.png"),
       plot = p_dens_valid_HF, width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
p_value_missing_HF <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep", type == "mean") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  mutate(value_status = if_else(is.na(value), "Missing value", "Valid value"),
         value_status = factor(value_status, levels = c("Valid value", "Missing value"))) %>%
  count(measurement, value_status) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value_status, y = n, fill = value_status)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = 1, size = 5) +
  facet_wrap(~measurement, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of observations",
    fill = NULL,
    title = "Availability of measurements",
    subtitle = "Absolute counts of valid and missing values for each measurement"
  )

p_value_missing_HF
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_value_availability_by_measurement.png"),
       plot = p_value_missing_HF, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^p_"))
```
